channel.title: The Hippie Scientist
channel.description: Evidence-based herbal supplement research, safety, and practical guides

item.title: Berberine: AMPK Activation, Metabolic Health, and Clinical Evidence
item.description: A rigorous, evidence-graded review of berberine covering AMPK mechanism, glucose metabolism trials, lipid effects, weight outcomes, drug interactions, and the 'nature's Ozempic' narrative.

item.title: Creatine for Brain Health: Evidence for Cognition, Mood, and Aging
item.description: Creatine is no longer just a gym supplement. Emerging evidence suggests benefits for cognitive function, mental fatigue, brain energy metabolism, and healthy aging. Here's what the research shows.

item.title: Functional Mushrooms 101: Reishi, Cordyceps, Chaga, and Turkey Tail
item.description: A practical, evidence-graded overview of four major functional mushrooms beyond Lion's Mane — covering mechanisms, key clinical findings, when to use each, and how to choose quality supplements.

item.title: How to Choose a Quality Supplement: Testing, Labels, and Red Flags
item.description: A practical guide to evaluating supplement quality — third-party certifications (USP, NSF, ConsumerLab), label reading, red flags, and how to avoid adulterated or mislabeled products.

item.title: Lion's Mane vs Stimulants for ADHD: What the Evidence Shows
item.description: An honest, evidence-graded comparison of Lion's Mane mushroom and prescription stimulants (Adderall, Vyvanse, Ritalin) for ADHD. Covering mechanisms, clinical evidence, side effect profiles, and the critical differences between a dietary supplement and FDA-approved medications.

item.title: Mushroom Coffee: Benefits, Science, and Brand Guide
item.description: An evidence-based look at mushroom coffee — what the science says about lion's mane, chaga, reishi, and cordyceps in coffee, whether the benefits are real, and how to evaluate brands.

item.title: Saffron for Depression: What the Clinical Evidence Shows
item.description: An evidence-graded review of saffron (Crocus sativus) for depression — clinical trial outcomes compared to placebo and antidepressants, mechanisms, dosing, and safety.

item.title: Adaptogenic Compounds: Clinical Evidence for HPA Axis and Stress
item.description: An evidence-based review of adaptogenic natural compounds covering Ashwagandha, Rhodiola, Ginseng, Tulsi, and more—with clinical trial data on HPA axis regulation, cortisol, and stress resilience.

item.title: The Entourage Effect in Herbal Supplements: Evidence Review
item.description: A skeptical, evidence-based guide to the entourage effect in natural compounds, including full-spectrum extracts, phytochemical synergy, clinical evidence, stacking logic, and safety limits.

item.title: Natural Compounds: Biosynthetic Gene Clusters and Drug Discovery
item.description: An evidence-based deep dive into biosynthetic gene clusters (BGCs) and cheminformatic space mapping, showing how genome mining and chemical clustering are transforming natural product supplement discovery.

item.title: Elderberry for Colds and Flu: Clinical Evidence Review
item.description: Evidence-based review of elderberry for upper respiratory infections, including clinical trials, systematic reviews, safety profile, quality considerations, and practical harm reduction guidance.

item.title: Kava for Anxiety and Sleep: Evidence, Safety, and Kavalactones
item.description: A research-graded review of kava covering kavalactone mechanisms, anxiety trials, sleep-adjacent use, liver safety, dosing context, and comparisons with ashwagandha, L-theanine, and passionflower.

item.title: Lion's Mane Mushroom: Benefits, Mechanisms, and Evidence Guide
item.description: A practical evidence-based guide to Lion's Mane mushroom, including mechanisms, dosage, safety, cognitive evidence, mood data, nerve regeneration research, and realistic expectations.

item.title: Peptides: What the Research Shows — Mechanisms and Clinical Evidence
item.description: A comprehensive, evidence-graded review of bioactive peptides covering growth hormone secretagogues, collagen peptides, BPC-157, thymosin beta-4, and more — with citations from PubMed, NIH, and peer-reviewed clinical trials.

item.title: Ashwagandha: Stress, Cortisol, and Anxiety — Clinical Evidence
item.description: A thorough, evidence-graded review of ashwagandha covering withanolide mechanisms, HPA axis modulation, cortisol reduction studies, menopausal anxiety RCTs, and dosage standards.

item.title: Bacopa Monnieri: Memory, Focus, and Neurotransmitter Support
item.description: A research-graded review of Bacopa monnieri (Brahmi) covering bacosides mechanisms, acetylcholinesterase activity, serotonin modulation, and RCT evidence in older adults and healthy populations.

item.title: Ginkgo Biloba: Cerebral Blood Flow, Cognition, and Aging
item.description: A research-graded review of Ginkgo biloba (EGb 761) covering flavonol and terpene mechanisms, cerebrovascular effects, dementia RCTs, and the large GEM trial's nuanced findings on aging and cognition.

item.title: L-Theanine: Calm Focus, Anxiety, Sleep, and Caffeine — Evidence Guide
item.description: A practical evidence guide to L-theanine for calm focus, caffeine jitters, stress, anxiety, and sleep, including dosing, safety, and when magnesium or ashwagandha may be a better fit.

item.title: Lion's Mane Mushroom: Mechanisms, Clinical Evidence, and Practical Use
item.description: A thorough, evidence-graded review of Hericium erinaceus — covering NGF and BDNF pathways, clinical trial outcomes in mild cognitive impairment, effective dosage ranges, and safety considerations.

item.title: Magnesium Glycinate: Sleep, Stress, and Anxiety — Evidence Review
item.description: A comprehensive, evidence-graded review of magnesium glycinate covering GABA receptor modulation, NMDA antagonism, sleep latency RCTs, and why chelated forms outperform oxide in clinical settings.

item.title: NAC (N-Acetyl Cysteine): Glutathione, Lung Health, and Psychiatry
item.description: A research-graded review of N-Acetyl Cysteine covering glutathione synthesis, mucolytic mechanisms, COPD and respiratory RCTs, oxidative stress reduction, and psychiatric applications.

item.title: Passionflower: GABAergic Action, Anxiety RCTs, and Sleep Quality
item.description: A research-graded review of Passiflora incarnata covering chrysin and benzoflavone mechanisms, GABA-A receptor activity, anxiety RCTs, and sleep quality evidence from controlled trials.

item.title: Rhodiola Rosea: Adaptogen Mechanisms, Fatigue, and Cortisol
item.description: A research-graded review of Rhodiola rosea covering adaptogenic mechanisms, salidroside and rosavin pharmacology, fatigue and burnout RCTs, HPA axis modulation, and dosage standards.

item.title: Valerian Root: GABA, Sleep Quality, and Herb-Drug Interactions
item.description: An evidence-graded review of valerian root (Valeriana officinalis) covering valerenic acid GABA-A receptor activity, sleep quality meta-analyses, dosing standards, and clinically important drug interactions.

item.title: 2C-B: Mechanism, Effects, and Harm Reduction
item.description: 2C-B is a Schedule I synthetic phenethylamine with limited human safety data; this reference summarizes known pharmacology, reported effects, and harm-reduction constraints without endorsing use.

item.title: Rhodiola vs. Ashwagandha: Matching Adaptogens to Your Needs
item.description: >- A comparative guide to choosing between rhodiola and ashwagandha based on stress patterns, energy, and constitution.

item.title: Kava Safety: Kavalactones, Extraction, and Liver Risk
item.description: >- Understanding how preparation methods influence the safety profile of kava and what current evidence says about hepatotoxicity.

item.title: Cacao and Theobromine: A Gentle Stimulant Profile
item.description: >- Exploring how ceremonial cacao delivers uplift through theobromine, polyphenols, and mindful preparation.

item.title: Blue Lotus (Nymphaea) and Aporphines for Gentle Sedation
item.description: >- How Nymphaea caerulea’s alkaloids shape its calming, dreamy reputation and what to know before steeping petals.

item.title: Start Here: Building a Simple Nightly Herb Blend
item.description: >- A step-by-step framework for crafting a calming bedtime herbal blend with adaptogens, nervines, and aromatics.

item.title: Lion''s Mane and BDNF: What the Evidence Shows
item.description: >- Reviewing how Hericium erinaceus extracts may influence brain-derived neurotrophic factor and cognitive resilience.

item.title: Yerba Mate vs. Green Tea: Balancing Caffeine and L-Theanine
item.description: >- How two classic infusions deliver different energy arcs and how to choose for mood, focus, and ritual.

item.title: Kanna (Sceletium) for Mood and Focus
item.description: >- How traditional Sceletium extracts may lift mood and sharpen attention without overstimulation.

item.title: Reishi for Sleep and Immunity: What the Studies Say
item.description: >- Reviewing Ganoderma lucidum research on nervous system balance, immune modulation, and nighttime rest.

item.title: Mugwort and Dreaming: Tradition Meets Evidence
item.description: >- Evaluating Artemisia vulgaris for dream work, lucid practices, and the modern sleep cycle.
